title: Syntherisma leiantha
taxonomy: Syntherisma leiantha is classified under the family Crambidae and the order Lepidoptera. It belongs to the genus Syntherisma and is a species of moth. Syntherisma leiantha is further classified as a member of the family Crambidae, which includes various types of moths and butterflies. This species is found in Australia and is known for its distinct characteristics. Further classification may include its specific habitat and other details, but the primary classification places it within the order Lepidoptera.
